label: Bay Area · I-880 N — AM peak (Caltrans PeMS + CHP)
source: Caltrans PeMS D4 · I-880 N mainline, 5-min speed+flow, 2026-04-21 AM · CHP incidents. Public.

narration.text: Corridor near free-flow (~102% of the peak reference speed). Detectors nominal; no active TIM.
Traffic Hazard reported 06:25 on link 14 (severity 7). TIM phases: detection → verification → response → clearance → recovery.
Trfc Collision-No Inj reported 06:50 on link 90 (severity 496). TIM phases: detection → verification → response → clearance → recovery.

Worst at 07:55 — corridor at ~84% of reference (bottleneck links far lower). Queue spillback extends upstream; secondary-crash risk window open. Candidate response: VSL harmonization, ramp metering, DMS diversion.
Traffic Hazard reported 08:30 on link 82 (severity 6). TIM phases: detection → verification → response → clearance → recovery.
Traffic Hazard reported 10:00 on link 90 (severity 20). TIM phases: detection → verification → response → clearance → recovery.
Trfc Collision-Unkn Inj reported 10:40 on link 75 (severity 18). TIM phases: detection → verification → response → clearance → recovery.
